creator: sporty@sporty.org
text:
it seems to be as on a linux system this won't happen for the same version
of X on linux.  Are you too, using a revolution 3d?



> First - this isn't a FreeBSD problem.  Second, I haven't experienced this
> at all and I've been using a I128 for a long time.  It used to happen to
> me on an old version of X but hasn't since 3.3.1 or so.
